profile.name: Jose Manuel Cabrera Rojas
profile.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer | Business Analytics Candidate

hero.headline: Engineering data-driven products with strategic business impact.
hero.description: Professional portfolio focused on Full-Stack architecture, analytics visualization and execution centered on time-to-market.

certifications.title: Certifications and specialization signals
certifications.subtitle: Executive education and cloud/data learning tracks positioned as proof of a disciplined transition into Business Analytics, applied Data Science and modern React 19 product delivery.

experience.title: 10-year industry trajectory
experience.subtitle: Hands-on delivery across automotive, mechanical simulation, telecommunications and developing, building technical solutions focused on performance, reliability and operational scale.
experience.developmentDetail: Implementation of connected solutions for high-availability operations and critical response-time environments.
experience.automotiveDetail: Applied engineering for industrial processes, systems integration and continuous improvement aligned with business impact.
experience.simulationDetail: Mechanical design of in-line production components and stress testing for continuous improvement
experience.dataScienceDetail: Database analysis using self-adjusting learning models for process optimization and cost reduction

story.title: Story and Data Science transition
story.subtitle: The professional evolution bridges Full-Stack engineering with predictive analytics to reduce uncertainty and accelerate business decisions.

phase1.title: Hardware & Low-Level Control
phase1.description: Design of low-cost PLC systems and power circuits in assembler using MPLab.

phase2.title: CAN-BUS Protocol Intelligence
phase2.description: CAN-BUS network monitoring for critical fault detection in automotive systems.

phase3.title: Structural Logic & Wind Tunnel
phase3.description: Stress and airflow simulation in SolidWorks to optimize Sky antenna structures.

phase4.title: Business Intelligence & Strategy
phase4.description: Turning industrial data into investment strategy and predictive dashboard decisions.

main.title: Primary Identity
main.value: Senior Full-Stack Developer transitioning into Data Science and Business Analytics.

education.title: Education
education.value: Mechatronics Engineer (Anahuac) and current Business Analytics Master's student at EGADE (graduating in 2028).

trajectory.title: Trajectory
trajectory.value: 9 years of technical experience evolving from automotive and software development into data-driven applications.
